title: Government focused on potential and threat of quantum computing
description: Hypertext (journalism). Reports DCDT Deputy Minister Mondli Gungubele calling post-quantum cryptography 'a global security priority'; references National Cybersecurity Policy Framework and SA Connect. Secondary/journalistic, not a primary government document.

title: Rainbow Nation to Quantum Nation: South African Telecom's Quantum-Safe Cryptography Era
description: Telecom Review Africa (trade journalism). Discusses DCDT, ICASA cryptographic agility, Cybersecurity Hub coordination on quantum-safe cryptography in telecom. Not an institutional primary document.

title: South Africa needs a national 'quantum defence strategy'
description: TechCentral (journalism/opinion). Argues South Africa lacks a national quantum defence strategy; mentions CSIR, Wits Quantum Research Group testing PQC. Not a government document.

title: South Africa Inc must wake up to quantum threat
description: TechCentral (journalism/opinion). Commentary on quantum threat to South African encryption and critical infrastructure. Not a government document.

title: South African organisations face cybersecurity tipping point
description: Hypertext (journalism). Cybersecurity commentary referencing quantum risk for South African organisations. Not a government document.

title: The accelerated 2029 quantum computing deadline turns current encryption into a looming crisis
description: AI Impact (blog/journalism). Commentary on quantum computing deadline and encryption risk in a South African framing. Not a government document.

title: How the South African financial sector can embrace quantum (Working Paper 13)
description: Centre of Excellence in Financial Services (COEFS), an industry/research think-tank, not a government or standards body. Working paper on quantum (including post-quantum security) for the SA financial sector. Non-institutional issuer.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography for securing Electronic Health Records in the South African Public Healthcare System
description: Academic journal article (Journal of Information Systems and Informatics). PQC applied to SA public healthcare records. Academic, not institutional/government.

title: Opening Address by Ms Khumbudzo Ntshavheni at the 23rd Annual SATNAC
description: DCDT (Department of Communications and Digital Technologies), official .gov.za. Verified via fetch (dated 22 Nov 2021): covers 5G, satellite, AI, cloud, data sovereignty. NO post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography mention. Domestic institutional but fails PQC-explicit test.

title: DCDT Media Statement - 3rd Digital Economy Working Group 2025
description: DCDT (official .gov.za) media statement on G20 Digital Economy Working Group 2025. Verified via fetch: NO post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography mention. Domestic institutional but fails PQC-explicit test.

title: Deputy Minister Nomalungelo Gina unveils Centre for Quantum Computing and Technology at UKZN
description: South African Government (gov.za) media statement, Dept of Science, Technology and Innovation. Unveils CQCtec quantum computing centre at UKZN (SAQuTI node). Quantum technology, but no explicit post-quantum cryptography migration content surfaced; fails PQC-explicit test.

title: Deputy Minister Gungubele's 2025 Budget Vote Speech
description: DCDT (official .gov.za) Deputy Minister budget vote speech 2025. Surfaced in PQC-themed search but no verified explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference; cybersecurity-general.
